name: v05-github-handler-pr
description: Per-event GitHub webhook sub-workflow: handles the pull-request family (pull_request, pull_request_review, pull_request_review_comment). Real deployments would update review state, post status checks, run lint/preview pipelines. The router groups this whole family via switch-case `when: [...]` so all PR-adjacent events flow through the same sub-workflow.

inputs.expression: ({ handler: 'pr-family', action: ctx.request.body.action || null, prNumber: (ctx.request.body.pull_request && ctx.request.body.pull_request.number) || null, eventType: ctx.request.body._eventType || null })
